rider_silas_quinn:idle.greeting: Silas Quinn touches the brim of his hat. "Walker. The road is open today. Speak."

nodes.npcText: "Make it brief. The west doesn't wait."

playerOptions.text: The portal at the west perimeter — Kel Sandren tracks it too.

nodes.npcText: He nods once. "Then carry my log to Kel. He'll know what to do with it."
"Dawn. The west road. Spare horse on the line."
The hat tips back down. He's gone.

scout_pell_orange:idle.greeting: Pell crouches at the edge of the dust. Doesn't turn. "Walker. Quiet."

playerOptions.text: Same print Kiren Owl tracks. And Emer. And Brann.

nodes.npcText: "Four scouts, four worlds, one creature. Bring me to Zara when she's free. We'll plan."
Pell returns to reading the dust.

healer_jensa_bell:idle.greeting: Jensa wipes flour off her hands. "Walker. I'm baking. Talk while I knead."

nodes.npcText: "Bless her. Back room, behind the flour sacks. Don't be seen."
